nasb.text: These were their offices for their ministry when they came in to the house of the Lord according to the ordinance given to them through Aaron their father, just as the Lord God of Israel had commanded him.

esv.text: These had as their appointed duty in their service to come into the house of the Lord according to the procedure established for them by Aaron their father, as the Lord God of Israel had commanded him.

cnv.text: 這就是他們的班次，是照著耶和華以色列的　神藉著他們的祖宗亞倫所吩咐的條例，進入耶和華的殿，辦理事務。

ccb.text: 他们照这班次，按以色列的上帝耶和华借他们的祖先亚伦所定的条例，在耶和华的殿里司职。
